description.from: Throws a spear at the farthest enemy, dealing 157*(1+0.3Skill Level)+121.2% of Attack Power as Physical Damage, pulls them in front of you, then deals 105(1+0.3Skill Level)+80.8% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to enemies within range and stuns them for 3 sec.
description.to: Throws a spear at the farthest enemy, dealing 157*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+121.2% ATK as Physical DMG, pulling them in front of you. Then deals 105*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+80.8% ATK as Physical DMG to enemies within range and stuns them for 1sec.

description.from: For 7 sec, your Physical Block Chance is increased by 200, and when you block, you deal 95(1+0.3Skill Level)+72.6% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to nearby enemies and reduce their Attack by 25%.
description.to: For 5sec, your Physical Block Chance is increased by 800. When you block, deals 95*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+72.6% ATK as Physical DMG to nearby enemies and reduces their ATK by 25%.

description.from:
For 8 sec, all allies’ Physical Damage taken is reduced by 20%, and you prepare to leap for 5 sec.
While preparing to leap, when you block, the leap attack’s damage is increased by 7%, you deal 126(1+0.3Skill Level)+96.8% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to the attacker, and stun them for 0.4 sec.
When casting is complete, you leap to the enemy, dealing 465(1+0.3Skill Level)+357.5% of Attack Power as Physical Damage and stunning them for 2.5 sec.
While preparing to leap, you are immune to status ailments.
description.to:
For 5sec, increases all allies’ Physical Block Chance by 400 and prepares to leap.
While preparing, becomes immune to status ailments. When you block, increases the leap attack’s DMG by 8% and deals 126*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+96.8% ATK as Physical DMG to the attacker.
When preparation ends, leaps to the nearest enemy, dealing 465*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+357.5% ATK as Physical DMG and stuns them for 1sec.

description.from: Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 30(1+0.3Skill Level) and Physical Block Chance by 250.
description.to: Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 60*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Physical Block Chance by 120.

IV.from: Increases the duration of stun by 1.2 sec.
IV.to: Increases the duration of stun by 0.5 sec.

dark.from: Reduces the Physical Defense of pulled enemies by 30% for 5 sec.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 4 sec.

dark.from: On cast, increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 24% for 7 sec.
dark.to: On cast, increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 15% for 5 sec.

dark.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 6 sec.
dark.to: On cast, increases all allies’ Physical DMG reduction by 30% for 5 sec.

light.from: Physical Defense increase is boosted by 30%, and Physical Block Chance is increased by 75.
light.to: Physical Defense increase amount increases by 50%.

dark.from: Physical Critical Resistance is additionally increased by 250.

description.from: [Will to Win] increases P.Block chance by 100 and raises the target’s P.DMG taken by {0}% for 5 sec.
description.to: [Will to Win] increases P.Block chance by 400 and raises the target’s P.DMG taken by {0}% for 5 sec.

description.from: [Steel Fortress] increases DMG Boost on Block by 50% and extends the Stun duration of Leap Attack by {0} sec.
description.to: [Steel Fortress] increases DMG Boost on Block by 24% and extends the Stun duration of Leap Attack by {0} sec.

dark.from: At the start of each battle, reduces all enemies’ Attack by 25% for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.
dark.to: At the start of each battle, reduces all enemies’ Attack by 15% for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.
